## NetworkResponsePromise type

Promise that resolves to a [NetworkResponse](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.networkresponse) or [ABORTED](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.aborted) if the request was cancelled.

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare type NetworkResponsePromise = Promise<NetworkResponse | typeof ABORTED>;
```
**References:** [NetworkResponse](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.networkresponse)<!-- -->, [ABORTED](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.aborted)
